title: Perforated Cable Trays
content: Perforated cable trays are used for supporting cables in industrial electrical projects. Available in GI, Stainless Steel, and Powder Coated.

title: Ladder Type Cable Trays
content: Ladder cable trays are suitable for heavy cable installations, providing superior ventilation and load capacity.

title: Raceways & Trunking
content: Raceway systems are used for neat cable routing and management across electrical projects.
